tagline: Processes adverse-event cases — a QPPV / drug-safety physician signs before reporting.
problem: Pharmacovigilance is high-volume ICSR processing under a 15-day expedited clock, where a named QPPV is legally accountable for every causality and seriousness call.
outcome: Cases coded, de-duplicated and causality-assessed straight-through; the QPPV signs before any safety report is submitted.

steps.does: Intake the adverse-event case (ICSR) from the source
MedDRA-code the terms, de-duplicate, and triage seriousness / expectedness
Assess causality and check the 15-day expedited-reporting clock
The QPPV / drug-safety physician signs the case assessment
Submit the safety report (E2B) to FAERS / EudraVigilance
Run signal detection and maintain the safety database
